transcript_contains.description: the transcript contains this literal substring

transcript_not_contains.description: the transcript does NOT contain this literal substring

transcript_matches.description: regex (case-insensitive) over the transcript — fuzzy content for stochastic prose

transcript_not_matches.description: regex (case-insensitive) that must NOT match the transcript

file_exists.description: a file exists at this path under the agent's work root

user_visible_artifact.description: a file exists AND is under a user-visible prefix (mnt/outputs or mnt/.projects — Cowork-promoted)

tool_called.description: a tool with this name was called

tool_not_called.description: a tool with this name was NOT called

subagent_dispatched.description: a sub-agent matching this regex (by agentType or description) was dispatched

subagent_declared_but_unused.description: a sub-agent declared this tool but never used it (the fabrication proxy)

egress_denied.description: egress to this host was denied

egress_allowed.description: egress to this host was allowed

no_delete_in_outputs.description: fails if a delete touching mnt/outputs is DETECTED (post-run bash-command scan, not FUSE-level enforcement — a green means none was detected); only `true` is valid (writing `false` is a rejected footgun — omit to allow deletes)

transcript_no_host_path.description: no /Users//opt host path leaked into model-visible text

question_asked.description: a question matching this regex was asked

questions_count_max.description: at most N questions were asked

gate_answers_delivered.description: every answered AskUserQuestion gate's tool_result was non-error (the answer reached the model)

result.description: the run's final result was success | error

allow_permissive_auto_allow.description: (verdict modifier) suppress the default-fail when the run recorded a cowork-parity permissive auto-allow — for tests that deliberately assert Cowork's permissive behavior

allow_l0_plugin_divergence.description: (verdict modifier) suppress the default-fail when L0 (protocol) runs with plugins that load via --settings/managed config instead of --plugin-dir — for tests that deliberately test at L0 with plugins

replay_protocol_fidelity.description: (replay-only, NOT authorable) serializeDecision output matched the frozen recording — the token-free O7 guard; synthesized by the replay lane and rejected if written in a scenario

artifact.description: relative path to a JSON artifact under the work root (e.g. outputs/cap_state.json)

path.description: dotted path into the JSON (e.g. me.run_id); omit to target the whole document

in.description: the resolved value deep-equals one of these (stable for stochastic/LLM-extracted values where equals churns)

gt.description: the resolved value is a number greater than this

exists.description: the path resolves to a present (non-absent) value

absent.description: the final key is absent from its (resolved) parent — the anti-hallucination negative

is_null.description: the resolved value is JSON null (distinct from absent)

artifact_json.description: assert over a JSON artifact's contents (dotted path + equals|in|gt|exists|absent|is_null)

description: cowork-harness scenario YAML — prompt + scripted answers + assert:. See docs/scenario.md.
